name: Pipefy
description: Pipefy — No-code process management platform for building structured workflows with forms, rules, and approvals.

seo.title: Pipefy — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Pipefy: Pipefy — No-code process management platform for building structured workflows with forms, rules, and approvals.

when_to_use: No-code structured approval workflow with forms and rules
Vendor onboarding process with conditional routing logic
Cross-team request management replacing email and spreadsheets
IT service desk ticket workflow with SLA tracking
Hiring process management with stage-by-stage form automation

review.verdict: Solid no-code BPM for structured ops work — a better fit for process-heavy teams than general project work.
review.best_for: Operations, procurement, and HR teams running forms-driven approval processes
review.not_for: Engineering teams or those wanting free-form project management like Notion or Linear
